name: OxyGenX Pod Set – RETOUCH POD
shortDescription: Anti-aging OxyGenX pod set. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Skin renewal, wrinkle reduction, youthful appearance.
description:
The RETOUCH POD set is an anti-aging treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, targeting skin renewal and wrinkle reduction.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients support skin renewal and a more youthful appearance.
metaTitle: OxyGenX RETOUCH POD set – anti-aging treatment package
metaDescription: RETOUCH POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Anti-aging, skin renewal, wrinkle reduction. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does a RETOUCH POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the RETOUCH POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The RETOUCH POD is primarily recommended for mature, aging skin. Thanks to its anti-aging effect, it reduces wrinkles and supports skin renewal.

faq.question: Which device is the RETOUCH POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The RETOUCH POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
